questions.question: Which software testing method is most effective in identifying defects in early stages of development?
questions.explanation: Boundary Value Analysis helps identify defects in early stages by analyzing the boundary values of input data.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of Agile methodology in software development?
options: A) To follow a strict project plan
B) To deliver high-quality software quickly and flexibly
questions.explanation: The primary goal of Agile methodology is to deliver high-quality software quickly and flexibly by continuously delivering working software.

questions.question: Which software testing method is most cost-effective?
questions.explanation: Unit Testing is the most cost-effective software testing method as it tests individual components of the software.

questions.question: What is the benefit of using Agile methodology in software development?
options: C) To deliver high-quality software quickly and flexibly
D) To follow a strict project plan
questions.explanation: The benefit of using Agile methodology is to deliver high-quality software quickly and flexibly by continuously delivering working software.

questions.question: Which software testing method is most effective in identifying defects in user interface?
questions.explanation: White Box Testing is the most effective software testing method in identifying defects in user interface as it tests the internal structure of the software.
